ns0:entry.ns0:title: BerriAI/litellm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm
Language: python
Python SDK, Proxy Server (AI Gateway) to call 100+ LLM APIs in OpenAI (or native) format, with cost tracking, guardrails, loadbalancing and logging. [Bedrock, Azure, OpenAI, VertexAI, Cohere, Anthropic, Sagemaker, HuggingFace, VLLM, NVIDIA NIM]

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DrewThomasson/ebook2audiobook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DrewThomasson/ebook2audiobook
Language: python
Generate audiobooks from e-books, voice cloning & 1158+ languages!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FareedKhan-dev/train-llm-from-scratch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FareedKhan-dev/train-llm-from-scratch
Language: python
A straightforward method for training your LLM, from downloading data to generating text.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/NeMo
Language: python
A scalable generative AI framework built for researchers and developers working on Large Language Models, Multimodal, and Speech AI (Automatic Speech Recognition and Text-to-Speech)

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: modelscope/ms-swift
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/modelscope/ms-swift
Language: python
Use PEFT or Full-parameter to CPT/SFT/DPO/GRPO 600+ LLMs (Qwen3.6, DeepSeek-V4, GLM-5.1, InternLM3, Llama4, ...) and 300+ MLLMs (Qwen3-VL, Qwen3-Omni, InternVL3.5, Ovis2.5, GLM4.5v, Gemma4, Llava, Phi4, ...) (AAAI 2025).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: music-assistant/server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/music-assistant/server
Language: python
Music Assistant is a free, opensource Media library manager that connects to your streaming services and a wide range of connected speakers. The server is the beating heart, the core of Music Assistant and must run on an always-on device like a Raspberry Pi, a NAS or an Intel NUC or alike.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shuvonsec/claude-bug-bounty
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shuvonsec/claude-bug-bounty
Language: python
AI-powered bug bounty hunting from your terminal - recon, 20 vuln classes, autonomous hunting, and report generation. All inside Claude Code.
